_note: Xenon community gallery catalog. Rendered by docs/index.html and served to the app via GET /api/community/catalog. Entries are moderated: submit yours with a PR (see README.md in this folder). Every field is re-validated by the app before display, and installing always goes through the normal import preview. Entries with a 'limited' block are limited-edition drops: reservation-only (via Discord), carry no code, and set total/claimed copies — claimed>=total is sold out.

entries.name: DGM Air Quality
entries.author: DanielGarciaMorato
entries.description: Shows the European Air Quality Index and concentrations of PM2.5, PM10, ozone, and nitrogen dioxide for the city set in DGM Current Weather. The data are indicative and may differ from local station measurements. This widget provides environmental information and does not constitute a medical diagno

entries.name: DGM Current weather
entries.author: DanielGarciaMorato
entries.description: Check current weather conditions for a manually selected city: temperature, feels-like temperature, humidity, wind, and precipitation. Supports metric or imperial units and Spanish or English. The configured city is shared with other DGM Weather widgets via Xenon's official storage. Data provided by

entries.name: DGM 7-Day Forecast
entries.author: DanielGarciaMorato
entries.description: Show the daily weather forecast for the next seven days, including high and low temperatures, precipitation, and wind. It uses the city configured in DGM Current Weather, avoiding duplicate settings. Compatible with Spanish and English, as well as metric and imperial units. Data provided by Open-Met

entries.name: DGM weather radar
entries.author: DanielGarciaMorato
entries.description: Interactive map displaying the latest available radar precipitation layer for the city set in DGM Current Weather. It allows for panning, zooming, re-centering, and data refreshing. Colors represent different levels of precipitation intensity; the presence of precipitation does not necessarily imply

entries.name: Keyring
entries.author: xenon
entries.description: Encrypted 2FA codes and passwords in one place. Codes stay on screen by your keyboard with a countdown ring; the code for a focused desktop app floats to the top. Copying a password needs a tap you confirm. Everything is encrypted on this PC, with no cloud and no recovery.

entries.name: Thermal Card
entries.author: xenon
entries.description: CPU and GPU temperature, VRAM and RAM in one card. Tap any row to swap which value leads, and pick which monitors you want. Reads sensors only, with no actions and no network.

entries.name: Forest
entries.author: Domi / spamer7777-lgtm
entries.description: Bring the calming essence of nature directly to your screen. With its lush fern-green palette, earthy textures, and subtle golden accents, this theme transforms your dashboard into a quiet forest at twilight. Designed with high-contrast glass panels for clean readability, it’s the perfect dark aesth

entries.name: DGM News Sports
entries.author: DanielGarciaMorato
entries.description: Sports news widget for Xenon with six RSS feeds: Marca, AS, Mundo Deportivo, BBC Sport, The Guardian Sport, and ESPN. Features include balanced feed rotation, Spanish and English interface, thumbnails via the official SDK proxy, visual fallbacks and loading status indicators (partial load, error, an
entries.changelog: Re-exported after the publishing platform issue; no functional code changes.

entries.name: DGM News Technology
entries.author: DanielGarciaMorato
entries.description: Tech news widget for Xenon featuring six RSS feeds: Xataka, Hipertextual, Microsiervos, BBC Technology, The Guardian Technology, and Ars Technica. It includes balanced feed rotation, a Spanish and English interface, thumbnail generation via the official SDK proxy, visual fallbacks and loading states
entries.changelog: Re-exported after the publishing platform issue; no functional code changes.

entries.name: Map Explorer
entries.author: DanielGarciaMorato
entries.description:
DGM Map Explorer is a visual catalog for quickly accessing external video game maps from Xenon.

It includes 31 games and 32 selected destinations, with search, session-based favorites and recently opened games. Selecting a game displays a confirmation before opening its corresponding map in the def
entries.changelog: Simplified the interface with a single navigation bar for All, Favorites and Recent; renamed the visible widget to “Explorador de mapas”; and removed redundant headings, provider filters and settings. The catalog, URLs and permissions remain unchanged.

entries.name: DGM News General
entries.author: DanielGarciaMorato
entries.description: Widget de noticias generales para Xenon con seis fuentes RSS internacionales: El Mundo, El País, BBC News, The Guardian, The New York Times y Le Monde. Ofrece rotación equilibrada entre fuentes, interfaz en español e inglés, miniaturas mediante el proxy oficial del SDK, fallbacks visuales y estados
entries.changelog: Re-exported after the publishing platform issue; no functional code changes.

entries.name: VANGUARD 50 // VOICE RELAY
entries.author: xenon
entries.description: A Discord voice console with live session telemetry, set in an observatory night sky with an obsidian Deck. 50 copies, each carrying its own serial. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Discord.

entries.name: POW! — Comic Book Pack
entries.author: xenon
entries.description: An exclusive comic-book universe for the Xeneon Edge, for supporters only. A living hand-inked skyline shifts with the real weather and time of day, doubling as a screensaver, alongside comic System, Fans, Batteries and Energy boards and a hand-drawn Sidekick Deck. Six artifacts, one code.

entries.name: Ambra
entries.author: xenon
entries.description: A warm, minimal pack: an amber theme on deep espresso with the animated 'Bruma d'Ambra' background, a redesigned weather widget (temperature-forward, with an essential hourly strip) and an Ambient screensaver showing clock and weather.

entries.name: Teleprompter
entries.author: xenon
entries.description: Write a script, then read it like a pro: large auto-scrolling prompter text with the current sentence lit, a 3-2-1 countdown, drag-to-scrub, 0.5×–3× speed and a live time-remaining estimate. Keep a library of named scripts, drop [2s] anywhere to pause, and mirror it for prompter glass.

entries.name: NØVA // NEON DISTRICT
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: A limited cyberpunk drop: a neon duotone theme, the animated Megacity Drift background with a holographic whale, the Orbitron display font, three bespoke widgets (Vitals rings, Now Playing, Skynode weather), an Ambient scene and a Deck profile. Reserved on Discord: each buyer gets a personal access code. Only 5 exist worldwide.

entries.name: Ember Nights
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: Warm amber accent over a deep charcoal glass, a cozy evening look for the Edge.

entries.name: Deep Ocean
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: Cool cyan on abyssal navy: calm, high-contrast and easy on the eyes at night.

entries.name: Silk Waves
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: Slow flowing wave lines over a midnight gradient, an animated backdrop that stays out of the way.

entries.name: Nocturne
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: A quiet late-night look: sage-teal accent over deep charcoal-navy glass, with a soft drifting backdrop baked in. Calm and easy on the eyes after dark.

entries.name: Nocturne Drift
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: A calm animated backdrop: slow sage glows drifting over a near-black wash with a faint twinkling starfield. Bounded and quiet, it stays out of the way.

entries.name: Nocturne Control
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: An eight-key Deck profile for everyday control: media transport, mic mute, volume up or down, a 25-minute focus timer and a volume fader. Portable across machines.

entries.name: Nocturne Desk
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: A tidy dashboard page: now playing on the left with system, weather, agenda and tasks arranged cleanly beside it. A calm home screen for the Edge.

entries.name: Nocturne Now Playing
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: A now-playing player: the album cover fills the tile behind the track, artist, a progress bar and play/pause, previous and next controls. Follows your theme accent. Needs media access and control.

entries.name: Nocturne Hours
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: A calm fullscreen clock for Ambient mode: big time, the date and one slow breathing glow on a dim OLED-friendly background. Requests no permissions.

entries.name: Nocturne Pack
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: The whole Nocturne look in one install: the theme with its drifting backdrop, the now-playing widget, the ambient clock scene, the Deck profile and the desk page.

entries.name: Tranquility
entries.author: spamer7777-lgtm
entries.description: A serene Himalayan lake at golden hour: a temple, prayer flags and a boat, with drifting clouds, fireflies and shimmering water layered on top.

entries.name: Cats
entries.author: spamer7777-lgtm
entries.description: A cozy pastel room full of adorable cats, with floating hearts and soft sparkles drifting over the scene. Cute and sweet.

entries.name: Sakura
entries.author: spamer7777-lgtm
entries.description: A pink cherry-blossom look over deep plum glass. Its backdrop is a hand-painted Japanese scene (temple, torii and a coiling dragon) with sakura petals, drifting light rays and glowing lanterns animating gently on top.
